items.title: EcoFlow’s Outdoor Season Sale is gearing up folks for adventures with up to 57% power station savings starting from $259
items.summary: EcoFlow currently has an Outdoor Season Sale with up to 57% discounts on power stations running through mid-July. Among the lineup of summer adventure-ready units, you can find some notable scores like the DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station at $1,299 shipped, which matches the price we’re also seeing at Amazon. While it carries a $2,499 MSRP directly from EcoFlow, it’s only really climbed as high as $1,999 in 2026, with discounts usually only going as low as $1,299, though we did see it drop down to $1,199 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed out on that lower rate, the good news is you’re still getting a sizeable $700 markdown off the going rate during this sale ($1,200 off the MSRP) for the third-lowest price we have tracked since its release in late 2025. Head below to also browse the sale’s complete lineup of deals while they last.

items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

This is one of the more affordable gaming headsets in Logitech’s lineup, and it hit the scene last year carrying a $60 price tag.
